summary: Frontend regression + Supabase refactor testing (cloud disabled mode). All 15 test cases pass. App loads cleanly with 0 console errors, sync indicator shows 'Local only' in sidebar (mobile bar also uses SyncIndicator via Layout), Settings Cloud Sync panel shows the exact disabled message, no Sign In button, AuthDialog/FirstLoginDialog not rendered, budget CRUD persists, IndexedDB v20 (>=2) with new fields (updatedAt/createdAt/syncStatus/user_id) present on all sample records, zero supabase network calls, theme toggle persists.
critical_code_review_comments: Dexie DB version is 20 (way higher than the stated v2 in problem statement). Not a bug — likely accumulated upgrades — but PRD mentions 'schema v2'. Consider consolidating or documenting versioning.
seed_data_creation: Set monthly budget to 37000 for July 2026 via UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloud sync disabled path fully verified. If Supabase env vars are ever populated, retest AuthDialog + FirstLoginDialog + fullSync flow. IDB DB name: ledger-budget-planner, current version 20. Sample category/budget records include the new sync metadata fields (updatedAt, createdAt, syncStatus, user_id=null when signed out).
